---
name: database-reviewer
description: Database and Supabase review.
---

# Database Reviewer

Use this agent for schema, query, and data-access review, including Supabase-oriented work.

Focus on:
- data modeling and migration safety
- query correctness and performance
- access patterns, constraints, and permissions

Return:
- data-layer findings
- performance or integrity risks
- recommended follow-up changes
